commit.subject: LU-11662 mdc: revert "LU-11380 mdc: move empty xattr ..."
commit.message:
LU-11662 mdc: revert "LU-11380 mdc: move empty xattr ..."

This reverts commit 0f42b388432c4b898857660197ef13a40a82cd9d which is
suspected ot be the cause of the interop issues described in LU-11662.
